board_csa_architect.notes: Promotion copies agent config + vector data to Org 0. Aligns with L4-11 Knowledge Hierarchy (Global > Tenant > Agent). Versioned promotion records.

board_ciso_cybersecurity.notes: Promotion audit trail required. Only authorized admins may promote. Vector data integrity verified before Org 0 insertion.

board_caio_fullstack.notes: Vector steering data promotion must preserve tensor integrity. Semantic validation on promote. Aligns with L6-06a Two-Tier strategy.

board_vp_ops_devops.notes: Promotion is a one-time config copy operation. Low operational risk. Rollback is delete from Org 0.
